key_evidence: EU Parliament May 20 resolution (418 votes) urging EC to trigger conditionality mechanism and potentially suspend funds over Fico government rule-of-law dismantling
Liberties.eu 2026 Rule of Law Report names Slovakia one of five 'Dismantler' states — same classification that drove Croatia -7.8 May 21
Renew Europe Group statement explicitly calls for investigation into EU funds misuse
Fico government disputed resolution as political interference — confirms BND/INT pattern of denying multilateral oversight
Slovakia already 0.9 below Developing/Functional boundary; Dismantler signal pushes further from boundary
methodology_novel: Dismantler classification consistency across starting positions — Croatia (Functional 48.4) and Slovakia (bottom Developing 39.1) receive directionally identical signals; magnitude is anchored to starting position (Croatia -7.8 from mid-Functional; Slovakia -5.5 from bottom Developing) to respect floor proximity and avoid asymmetric over-penalization of already-low entities. See assessment.
